corpora.split_rule: group by source family and generator lineage, never random files
freeze unseen sizes and symbol renamings before tuning

objectives.title: valid certifying solver
objectives.gate: zero wrong answers, complete strict merges, independent SAT-model validation, and replayable UNSAT evidence

objectives.title: best official QF_UF sequential result
objectives.gate: match the best comparator coverage and beat its resource-normalized score on the exact SMT-COMP 2025 QF_UF selection

objectives.title: best full-library result
objectives.gate: coverage at least equal to every comparator at 2, 60, and 1200 seconds, with lower timeout-charged aggregate and common geometric time

objectives.title: held-out generalization
objectives.gate: repeat the V1/V2 direction on source-family-held-out or newly released benchmarks on two CPU classes

objectives.title: publishable differentiated mechanism
objectives.gate: closest-prior-art delta, component ablations, checked evidence, and no claim explained by one known ingredient

tracks.title: measurement, proof, and corpus foundation
tracks.first_gate: ingest exact SMT-COMP selection, add OpenSMT, reconstruct base CNF independently, and rerun current sound main at all declared budgets

tracks.title: modern SAT backend and inprocessing baseline
tracks.first_gate: embed Kissat 4.0.4 and ablate congruence, equivalence sweeping, factor/BVA, vivification, and phase options against the SC2021 backend on identical CNF
tracks.kill_condition: no broad end-to-end gain, proof/model incompatibility, or one isolated inprocessing option explains no repeatable wall-time change

tracks.title: one-pass typed structural IR and staged formula machine
tracks.first_gate: 7503-file tree/shadow parity plus parse-phase and end-to-end ABBA gate; only then profile a fused formula schedule and require at least 70 percent reusable static work
tracks.kill_condition: semantic mismatch, more than 1 percent p95 miss overhead, no end-to-end gain, or schedule construction above 5 percent of routed solve time

tracks.title: lazy-first reference and rollback EUF
tracks.first_gate: base-CNF-only CaDiCaL refinement on frozen Goel and graph controls, then conflict-only IPASIR-UP rollback closure
tracks.kill_condition: more invalid models without lower wall time, head regression, or unreplayable explanations

tracks.title: proof-complexity-triggered component migration
tracks.first_gate: telemetry classifier separates eager wins from tails at balanced accuracy at least 0.80 with overhead below 1 percent
tracks.kill_condition: held-out routing failure, migration without lower end-to-end cost, or bridge-proof failure

tracks.title: adequate-range Hall and native cardinality/PB sidecar
tracks.first_gate: typed finite-range certificates and matching/PB comparison on generated EUF pigeonhole scaling and frozen finite tail
tracks.kill_condition: range rarely provable, less than 30 percent value-cell reduction, or proof/check cost erases recovered time

tracks.title: component-local quotient RAM and class coding
tracks.first_gate: project class-code and sorting-network size against eager triangles and Ackermann pairs; require at least 25 percent fewer clauses or watches on a frozen broad stratum
tracks.kill_condition: variable growth dominates, source model decoding is incomplete, or no broad construction-cost advantage exists

tracks.title: theory-conditioned Boolean DAG and semantic factoring
tracks.first_gate: dual source-EUF and Boolean-gate congruence census; require at least 25 percent projected CNF reduction on 8 of 10 frozen hard table cases
tracks.kill_condition: generic SAT congruence/factoring matches the gain, proof provenance is incomplete, or CNF reduction does not reduce wall time

tracks.title: SAT-impact-aware explanations and theory vivification
tracks.first_gate: factorial comparison of Boolean-only, EUF-only, and combined vivification plus explanation objectives
tracks.kill_condition: explanation cost exceeds propagation savings or generic vivification explains the full gain

tracks.title: canonical frontier and bit-sliced finite-table quotient search
tracks.first_gate: source-complete assertion ledger, tiny-domain exhaustiveness, and canonical scalar frontier census; require useful state reuse or SIMD occupancy before a direct target comparison with Yices2
tracks.kill_condition: eligible population remains narrow, frontier occupancy stays below 70 percent, exhaustive cover is impractical, or target cannot beat Yices2

stages.title: freeze evidence
stages.exit: validated spec, exact manifests, five hashed solvers, current 2/60/1200 baseline, and current opportunity atlas

stages.title: cheap falsification
stages.exit: each survivor passes semantic differential and its preregistered census threshold

stages.title: isolated target mechanisms
stages.exit: same-binary causal gates with no loss and positive end-to-end timing

stages.title: heterogeneous solver
stages.exit: migration beats every fixed internal representation on held-out target families

stages.title: full promotion
stages.exit: two independent full runs pass coverage, speed, proof/model, resource, and family non-regression gates

stages.title: superiority evaluation
stages.exit: official selection and held-out campaign satisfy V0 through V3

required_artifacts: CPU, memory, compiler, and environment metadata
SAT proof and EUF lemma replay log
family taxonomy, near-duplicate clusters, and held-out split hashes
rejection record for every failed arm
